stemHtml: Which statement is correct as regards the display of the attitude indicator?

options.a: The blue/brown background moves so that it remains parallel to the aircraft`s lateral axis.
options.b: The yellow or white aircraft symbol remains fixed to the instrument casing.
options.c: The yellow or white aircraft symbol moves so that it remains parallel with the horizon.
options.d: The blue/brown background remains fixed to the aircraft`s lateral axis.
